_meta.note: Only runtime_ready scenes with verified chapter gates ship. The refused list is load-bearing: check_simulations.py pins it so an art_partial scene cannot be re-enabled without new signed art.

runtime_policy.chapter_gate: Never fetch a scene before a verified start chapter. research_hold scenes remain disabled.
runtime_policy.playback: Play once on entering the active chapter window, hold the authored final frame, and allow explicit replay afterward.
runtime_policy.backward_scrub: Reset scene time, actor transforms, pose selection, effects, and landmark state deterministically.
runtime_policy.lod1: Static atlas frame; at most three visible story beats.
runtime_policy.lod2: One active 2D atlas simulation plus local 3D or shader effects.
runtime_policy.lod3: Explicit inspect/replay using the same movement contract; optional sound later.
runtime_policy.missing_art: Do not substitute rigid mannequins. Show a disabled story marker with missing_assets metadata.
runtime_policy.reduced_motion: Use the final safe pose and suppress camera shake, rain motion, and repeated effects.

scenes.label: Roger starts the Great Pirate Era
The fruit, the sacrifice, and the straw-hat promise
Luffy proves the rubber power against Alvida

anchor.note: Hand-authored: Alvida's ship at sea between Foosha Village and Shells Town; no canon coordinate exists for the deck fight. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

scenes.label: Luffy launches Buggy from Orange Town
Sanji says goodbye and joins the crew

anchor.note: Hand-authored: Cocoyasi Village beside the Conomi 3D model. The island rows for the Conomi cluster carry DERIVED positions (~-110 lng) that disagree with the voyage's conomi-islands waypoint and the runtime model (~-168) — the model is where the reader sees Arlong Park, so the scenes stand with it. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

scenes.label: Luffy defeats Arlong and frees Nami

anchor.note: Hand-authored: Arlong Park at the conomi-arlong-park 3D model's anchor. The arlong-park island row's derived position (-121, -39) sits 47 degrees from the voyage waypoint and the model — anchoring the fight there put it in an empty sea (measured: the scene never entered the dwell viewport). Same discrepancy noted for the events layer in the verification queue. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

scenes.label: Buggy nearly executes Luffy on Roger's scaffold
The crew declares its dreams and enters the Grand Line

anchor.note: Hand-authored: open sea on the Reverse Mountain approach. Deliberately NOT anchored to reverse-mountain (island debuts ch101, after this scene's ch100 gate) nor to the into-the-grand-line event (occurs ch101) — either would leak. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.
